NOTICE OF ENTRY OF DISMISSAL AND POS FILED BY PLTFS
REMOVED FROM ASBESTOS STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON AUG-17-2005; CASE HAS BEEN DISMISSED.

ASBESTOS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARRAWAY, HANEY CARRAWAY, HESTER AS TO DEFENDANT KAISER GYPSUM COMPANY, INC. KAISER CEMENT CORP. DOES 1 THRU 10,000 DOE, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-17-2005
APPLICATION FOR PRO HAC VICE ADMISSION OF JAVIER GONZALEZ, PROOF OF SERVICE, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARRAWAY, HANEY CARRAWAY, HESTER HEARING SET FOR OCT-12-2004 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
APPLICATION FOR PRO HAC VICE ADMISSION OF SCOTT WILLIAM WERT, PROOF OF SERVICE, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARRAWAY, HANEY CARRAWAY, HESTER HEARING SET FOR OCT-12-2004 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER.
